mapper.sql: pew.employee_id as pe_id, pew.company, pew.post, pew.start_time, pew.end_time, pew.tele, pew.remarks, pew.attribute1, pew.attribute2, pew.attribute3, pew.enabled_flag, pew.id, pew.create_time, pew.create_by, pew.update_time, pew.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_workhistory (employee_id, company, post, start_time, end_time, tele, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_workhistory set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pew.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pew.company) > 0 then pew.company else null end as company, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pew.post) > 0 then pew.post else null end as post, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pew.remarks) > 0 then pew.remarks else null end as remarks, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pew.tele) > 0 then pew.tele else null end as tele from pm_employee_workhistory pew join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pew.employee_id where pew.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pew.company,pew.post,pew.remarks,pew.tele ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.sql:
select
,
from pm_employee_workhistory pew left join pm_employee_workhistory_temp pewt on pew.id = pewt.header_id and pewt.enabled_flag = 1 and pewt.check_flag = 'D' and pewt.instructions_flag = 'U'
